INSERT INTO test_special_values VALUES ([1, nan, 2, NULL, 3, nan, -4, NULL, inf, -inf]);
SELECT arrayReverseSort(arr) as res FROM test_special_values;
CREATE TABLE test_multi_args (arr1 Array(String), arr2 Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayReverseSort((x, y) -> y, arr1, arr2) as res FROM test_multi_args;
CREATE TABLE test_nested (arr Array(Int32), keys Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayReverseSort((x, y) -> -y, arr, keys) AS res FROM test_nested;
CREATE TABLE test_correlation (ID UInt32, arr Array(Int32));
SELECT ID, arrayReverseSort(arr) AS sorted_arr FROM test_correlation;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt32, arr Array(Int32));
SELECT j.id, arrayReverseSort(j.arr) AS sorted_arr FROM test_join j JOIN test_nested n ON j.id = n.arr1[1];
SELECT COUNT(*), arrayReverseSort(arr) FROM large_data GROUP BY arr;
